title: SimplyPF2e – AI Creature Forge
description: Generate fully-statted Pathfinder 2e NPCs and monsters from a text prompt. An AI (DeepSeek, OpenAI, or any OpenAI-compatible API) invents the concept, abilities, spells and gear; the module computes every number from the official GM Core Building Creatures benchmark tables and pulls abilities, spells and equipment from the PF2e system compendiums.
